title: filago gallica subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Filago gallica subsp. tenuifolia, also known as fine-leaved fleabane, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its yellow flowers and fine leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Filago gallica subsp. tenuifolia include its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the leaves in a salve or ointment.
